svg.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Beads v1.1.0 — System Diagram (GLM)
svg.desc: Single-image system diagram for Beads v1.1.0. Shows actors (users, agents, orchestrators), the system boundary, stores (local Dolt, wisp tables, JSONL export, backup, source Git), data movement (create/update/close write path; ready/show read path; dolt push/pull sync; export/import), the daily issue lifecycle (open, in_progress, blocked, deferred, closed), dependency-driven scheduling (blocks/conditional-blocks/waits-for/parent-child), the agent loop (prime, claim, comment, close, remember), the formula subsystem (formula → cook → proto, composition via extends/advice/aspects/expand), workflow instances (proto → pour → molecule, proto → wisp → wisp tables, promote, bonds, gates), terminal paths (distill, squash, burn, stale, gc, compact, flatten), and operational safeguards (doctor, config, backup, migrate). Source: github.com/gastownhall/beads/tree/v1.1.0.
svg.text: Actors · stores · sync · lifecycle · graph · formulas · instances · safeguards

g.text: Plan, prioritise, approve gates, accept outcomes.
bd create · bd assign · bd close --reason · bd gate resolve
Discover ready work, claim, do, narrate, close, hand off.
bd ready --claim · bd update · bd comment · bd prime
Drive molecules, evaluate gates, run recurring cycles.
bd mol ready --gated · bd gate check · bd mol wisp

svg.text: SYSTEM BOUNDARY · storage + commands (Areas 2, 4, 5, 7, 14) — one machine, one .beads/

g.text: Source of truth. Cell-level history. Auto-commit per write.
Tables: issues · dependencies · labels · events · comments
bd dolt push · bd dolt pull · bd vc status · bd branch
Never enter Dolt history. Never sync.
For viewers, interchange, migration. Not the sync channel.
bd export · bd import · bd config set export.auto true
bd backup init · bd backup sync · bd backup restore
bd create · bd update --claim · bd close
bd comment · bd dep add · bd label add
bd mol pour · bd mol wisp · bd gate create
Every write is one Dolt commit.
bd ready · bd blocked · bd list · bd search
bd show · bd history · bd dep tree · bd status
bd count · bd mol show · bd mol progress
bd reopen · bd defer · bd undefer · bd supersede
bd rename · bd rename-prefix · bd promote
bd doctor · bd config · bd bootstrap
bd migrate · bd recompute-blocked · bd gc
Or any DoltHub/S3/GCS Dolt remote URL.
Shares the remote URL; never collides with Dolt refs.
bd jira · bd linear · bd github
bd gitlab · bd notion · bd ado
Polled by bd gate check via the gh CLI.
gh run view · gh pr view

svg.text: bd dolt push / pull (separate from git)
DEPENDENCY-DRIVEN SCHEDULING · what bd ready computes (Area 6)

g.text: Hard blockers — exclude target from ready.
Affects ready work; not a hard blocker.
open · no active blockers · not deferred

svg.text: AGENT LOOP & MEMORY · context recovery and hand-off (Area 9)

g.text: bd remember "<insight>" --key <slug> · bd recall <slug> · bd memories · bd forget <slug> · bd audit record (append-only .beads/interactions.jsonl)

svg.text: ADVANCED WORKFLOW SUBSYSTEM · formulas → instances → control → completion (Areas 10–13)

g.text: Rejects: dup step IDs · bad extends
(bead disabled · mail not implemented in v1.1.0)
bd gate create · bd gate check
Hard delete · no digest · no undo
bd mol stale · bd stale · bd prune

svg.text: Coverage (1-5): Area 1 actors · Area 2 Dolt+JSONL+Wisp stores · Area 3 install · Area 4 issue model · Area 5 lifecycle
Coverage (6-10): Area 6 scheduling · Area 7 read/query · Area 8 dolt push/pull · Area 9 agent loop · Area 10 formula+proto
Coverage (11-14): Area 11 mol+wisp+promote · Area 12 bonds+gates · Area 13 distill/squash/burn · Area 14 ops+doctor
